title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Country Delight

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Country Delight
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Country Delight! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Country Delight:
Country Delight is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Country Delight!
